task_completion.description: The title 'Spring Tasting Menu' is formatted as Centered, Bold, and at least 16pt font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document. The text 'Spring Tasting Menu' should be visibly larger than the rest of the text, bolded, and aligned to the center of the page.

task_completion.description: Section headers ('STARTERS', 'MAINS', 'DESSERTS') are formatted as Heading 1 and Centered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the words 'STARTERS', 'MAINS', and 'DESSERTS'. They should be styled as Heading 1 (typically larger and bolder than normal text) and aligned to the center of the page.

task_completion.description: Dish names are formatted as Heading 2 and dish descriptions are Italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the individual dishes (e.g., 'Spring Pea Soup', 'Crab Cakes'). The dish names should be styled as Heading 2. The descriptive text immediately following or below each dish name must be in italics.

task_completion.description: All inline '[Allergens: ...]' tags and brackets have been removed from the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the text of the dish descriptions. There should be no visible text containing '[Allergens: ...]' or similar bracketed notes.

task_completion.description: An 'Allergen Matrix' table is created at the bottom of the document with the correct 7 columns and 9 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the document. There should be a table with the headers: 'Dish Name', 'Dairy', 'Gluten', 'Shellfish', 'Nuts', 'Soy', and 'Eggs'. The table should have 9 rows.

task_completion.description: The Allergen Matrix table is populated with dish names and 'X' marks for identified allergens.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the Allergen Matrix table. The 'Dish Name' column should list the dishes, and the corresponding allergen columns should contain 'X' marks where applicable.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processing application with a visible ribbon/toolbar, not just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The Allergen Matrix is a genuine word processor table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table should have visible gridlines or cell structures typical of a word processor table, rather than just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The agent saved the changes to the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save icon should not indicate unsaved changes (e.g., no red asterisk or 'modified' indicator on the save button/tab), or a save action (Ctrl+S or clicking Save) should be visible in the final steps.
